subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first to believe, on the night of 'Id al-Fitr
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O our Lord, the All-Merciful! O God, bestow Thy blessings upon the Essence of the Seven Letters, then upon the Letters of the Living from Thy presence, and cause to descend, O God, at this hour of Friday night, upon the Tree of Thy Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. سبحانک اللهم ربنا الرحمن اللهم صل علی ذات حروف السبع ثم حروف الحی من عندک و انزل اللهم حینئذ لیلة الجمعه علی شجرة وحدانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
